item.title: Novenas you can start today - 23 June
item.description:
Blessed Benedict Metzler
Blessed Eugenie Joubert
Blessed Jarich Of Mariegaarde
Blessed John Becchetti
Blessed Peter Of Luxembourg
Blessed Pietro Becchetti Da Fabriano
Martyred Soldiers Of Rome
Martyrs In Carthage By Hunneric
Martyrs Of Campania
Martyrs Of Seoul
Saint Bernadine Realino
Saint Jacques Fermin
Saint Jeroche
Saint Lidanus Of Sezze
Saint Martinian Of Rome
Saint Monegundis
Saint Oudoceus
Saint Processus
Saint Swithun

Feast Day: 2 July
Start Date: 23 June
End Date: 01 July
